title: Field Lines, Repetition, Combination, Structured Fields, and Limits · Runtime Recall
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs field lines, repetition, combination, structured fields, and limits from bounded byte and state evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the loss-aware bounded field-section model. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for loss-aware bounded field-section model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Parse case-insensitive token field names, colon delimiters, optional field whitespace, and field values while rejecting whitespace before the colon.
Preserve field-line order and repeated values, combining only when that field definition permits it.
Parse Connection options and nominate hop-by-hop fields dynamically instead of relying only on a fixed list.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Field Name Value Grammar · changed case · Review Field Name Value Grammar
steps.instruction:
review case — A review protocol team handles case 2816 in a incident replay lab retaining minimized request-smuggling corpora. Build deterministic Go evidence to preserve repeated field lines and reject sections beyond a bounded policy; preserve this operating constraint: a timeout must reserve cleanup time and retain the terminal phase; then truncate one content octet and classify incomplete framing without connection reuse. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only.
